name: Content Strategist
description: Produces the website content strategy: page inventory, copy tone, messaging hierarchy.

checks.fail: ⚠️  No README.md — content strategy will be inferred from package.json

checks.prompt: Create a website content strategy: (1) 6 page inventory items with purpose, (2) tone of voice guidelines (3 qualities), (3) headline and subheading for the hero section, (4) key value propositions. Be specific and publication-ready.
